tagline_fil: Libreng konsulta, lab tests, gamot, at dental - para sa lahat ng PhilHealth members
tagline_en: Free consultations, lab tests, medicines, and dental - for all PhilHealth members
howToAccess_fil: Mag-register sa isang accredited PhilHealth Konsulta provider. Makakuha ng Authorization Transaction Code (ATC). Ipakita ang ATC sa bawat visit.
howToAccess_en: Register with an accredited PhilHealth Konsulta provider. Get an Authorization Transaction Code (ATC). Show ATC at every visit.

medicines.note_fil: 53 generic medicines ang kasama. Ang eksaktong listahan ay makikita sa Annex C ng Circular 2024-0013.
medicines.note_en: 53 generic medicines included. Full list in Annex C of Circular 2024-0013.

services_fil: Oral screening / mouth examination - P300 (unang visit)
Dental cleaning (oral prophylaxis) - kasama sa P300
Fluoride varnish application - kasama sa P300
Pit and fissure sealant - P200 bawat ngipin, maximum 2 ngipin bawat taon
Emergency tooth extraction - covered sa loob ng package
services_en: Oral screening / mouth examination - PHP 300 (first visit)
Dental cleaning (oral prophylaxis) - included in PHP 300
Fluoride varnish application - included in PHP 300
Follow-up visit (minimum 4 months after first) - PHP 300
Pit and fissure sealant - PHP 200 per tooth, maximum 2 teeth per year
Emergency tooth extraction - covered within package
dental.copayNote_fil: Sa mga government/public dentist: walang copay. Sa private dentist: maximum P1,500 copay bawat visit.
dental.copayNote_en: At government/public dentists: no copay. At private dentists: maximum PHP 1,500 copay per visit.

eligibility_fil: Lahat ng aktibong PhilHealth members - employed, voluntary, NHTS, senior, OFW - pati na rin ang kanilang mga dependents.
eligibility_en: All active PhilHealth members - employed, voluntary, NHTS, senior, OFW - and their dependents.
importantNote_fil: Ang Konsulta Package ay para sa OUTPATIENT lamang. Hindi ito para sa ospital confinement. Para sa hospitalization, ang case rate packages ang mag-aaplika.
importantNote_en: The Konsulta Package is for OUTPATIENT use only. It is not for hospital confinement. For hospitalization, case rate packages apply.
